artifacts.summary: Official University of Alberta AI, data-safety, teaching, academic-integrity, and research guidance pages were found and fetched with Firecrawl. Task-force report, news/commentary, and journal-article results were recorded as rejected for current tracker claims.

artifacts.title: University of Alberta staged AI policy evidence summary
artifacts.summary: Staged evidence from official University of Alberta AI, data-safety, teaching, academic-integrity, and research guidance supports seven narrow agent-reviewed claim candidates. Plain HTTP from this worker was blocked by CloudFront, so successful public extraction used Firecrawl without bypassing access controls.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Plain static HTTP requests from this worker returned CloudFront 403 for the verified UAlberta pages; Firecrawl provided successful public fetches, and no bypass was attempted.
Rejected task-force report, news/commentary, and journal-article results were not used to support current staged claims.
The bundle stages candidates only; publishAsCanonical and isCanonical remain false.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
